versions.description:
Mini-Games adds daily puzzle games and live chat rounds to a Takaro game server. Players can solve Wordle, Hangman, and Hot/Cold once per day, answer live Trivia, Scramble, and Math Race rounds, build stats, and compete on cached leaderboards. Staff can manually start or cancel live rounds, reset player stats, manage mini-game bans, and review a module report.

## Key features

- Daily Wordle, Hangman, and Hot/Cold puzzles with per-player sessions and UTC rollover.
- Live Trivia, Scramble, Math Race, and Reaction Race rounds with first-correct-answer scoring.
- Points, optional currency rewards, daily point caps, and boost-tier multipliers.
- Player stats, per-game totals, Wordle streaks, and leaderboard cache generation.
- Admin controls for manual live rounds, round cancellation, reports, stat resets, and temporary or permanent mini-game bans.

## Configuration

Configure the interval and minimum online players for automatic live rounds, the answer window, point values per game, optional currency conversion, daily point caps, big-score announcements, Trivia source settings, and which games are enabled. Set `pointsToCurrencyRate` to `0` to keep rewards points-only. Use `triviaQuestionSource: custom` when you want rounds to use the module content bank instead of Open Trivia DB.

The module defines three permissions:

| Permission | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| `MINIGAMES_PLAY` | Allows players to use player-facing mini-game commands. |
| `MINIGAMES_BOOST` | Optional counted permission; each count adds a 25% point boost, capped at 2x. |
| `MINIGAMES_MANAGE` | Allows staff to use admin mini-game commands. |

## Player commands

| Command | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| `/minigames [game]` | Show the mini-games overview or rules for one game. |
| `/wordle [guess]` | Check or submit the daily 5-letter Wordle puzzle. |
| `/hangman [letter|word]` | Check the daily Hangman board, guess a letter, or solve the word. |
| `/hotcold [number]` | Check or guess the daily Hot/Cold number from 1 to 1000. |
| `/puzzle` | Show today's daily puzzle status and time until UTC rollover. |
| `/answer <response>` | Answer the active Trivia, Scramble, or Math Race live round. |
| `/minigamestats [player]` | Show lifetime, daily, streak, and per-game stats. |
| `/minigamestop <points|wordle|hangman|streak>` | Show cached leaderboards. |

## Admin commands

| Command | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| `/minigamesfirenow [game]` | Start a live round immediately; supported values are `trivia`, `scramble`, `mathrace`, and `reactionrace`. |
| `/minigamesskiproundnow` | Cancel the current live round without a winner. |
| `/minigamesreport` | Send staff a lifetime mini-games report. |
| `/minigamesban <player> [hours]` | Ban a player from mini-games permanently or for a fixed number of hours. |
| `/minigamesunban <player>` | Remove a mini-games ban. |
| `/minigamesresetstats <player>` | Delete a player's stored mini-games stats. |

## Hooks and cron jobs

The `onChatMessage` hook handles Reaction Race answers typed directly in chat, while `onPlayerDisconnect` performs light cleanup when players leave without deleting their puzzle progress.

Six cron jobs keep the module moving without staff intervention:

| Cron job | Schedule | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `rolloverDailyPuzzles` | `0 0 * * *` | Picks the next UTC day's Wordle, Hangman, and Hot/Cold puzzles and clears yesterday's sessions. |
| `fireLiveRound` | `*/5 * * * *` | Starts a random enabled live round when enough players are online and the interval has elapsed. |
| `closeLiveRound` | `* * * * *` | Closes expired live rounds and announces the answer. |
| `refreshLeaderboards` | `*/5 * * * *` | Aggregates player stats into leaderboard cache variables. |
| `expireWindows` | `0 0 * * *` | Deletes old daily point-window variables. |
| `expireBans` | `0 * * * *` | Removes temporary bans after they expire. |

## Requirements

Grant `MINIGAMES_PLAY` to players before they use the games. Grant `MINIGAMES_MANAGE` only to staff. Economy is optional: leave `pointsToCurrencyRate` at `0` for points-only play, or set a conversion rate when you want points to pay Takaro currency.
versions.configSchema: {"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#","type":"object","properties":{"liveRoundIntervalMinutes":{"type":"number","default":30,"minimum":5,"description":"Minimum minutes between automatic live rounds."},"minPlayersForLiveRound":{"type":"number","default":2,"minimum":1,"description":"Minimum online players required to fire a live round."},"liveRoundAnswerWindowSec":{"type":"number","default":60,"minimum":15,"description":"How long players have to answer a live round."},"pointsToCurrencyRate":{"type":"number","default":0,"description":"Currency paid per point. 0 disables currency rewards."},"dailyPointsCapPerPlayer":{"type":"number","default":0,"description":"Max points per UTC day per player. 0 = unlimited."},"bigScoreThreshold":{"type":"number","default":500,"description":"Scores at/above this emit a chat announcement."},"pointsWordleBase":{"type":"number","default":100},"pointsHangmanBase":{"type":"number","default":80},"pointsHotColdBase":{"type":"number","default":60},"pointsTriviaWin":{"type":"number","default":40},"pointsScrambleWin":{"type":"number","default":40},"pointsMathRaceWin":{"type":"number","default":40},"pointsReactionRaceWin":{"type":"number","default":20},"triviaQuestionSource":{"type":"string","enum":["api","custom"],"default":"api","description":"Trivia source. 'api' fetches from Open Trivia DB; falls back to custom bank on failure."},"triviaApiCategory":{"type":"array","default":["any"],"items":{"type":"string"},"description":"OpenTDB category keys. ['any'] = no filter. Multiple = random pick per round."},"triviaApiDifficulty":{"type":"string","enum":["any","easy","medium","hard"],"default":"any"},"triviaApiType":{"type":"string","enum":["any","multiple","boolean"],"default":"any"},"games":{"type":"object","properties":{"wordle":{"type":"boolean","default":true},"hangman":{"type":"boolean","default":true},"hotcold":{"type":"boolean","default":true},"trivia":{"type":"boolean","default":true},"scramble":{"type":"boolean","default":true},"mathrace":{"type":"boolean","default":true},"reactionrace":{"type":"boolean","default":true}},"default":{"wordle":true,"hangman":true,"hotcold":true,"trivia":true,"scramble":true,"mathrace":true,"reactionrace":true}}},"required":[],"additionalProperties":false}

commands.name: minigames
commands.helpText: Usage: /minigames [game] — Show help for all games or a specific game.

arguments.name: game
arguments.helpText: Optional game name to show rules for.

commands.name: wordle
commands.helpText: Usage: /wordle [guess] — No arg shows today's attempts; with 5-letter guess submits a guess.

commands.name: hangman
commands.helpText: Usage: /hangman [letter|word] — No arg shows board; letter guesses a letter; full word attempts solve.

arguments.name: letterOrWord
arguments.helpText: A single letter or the full word.

commands.name: hotcold
commands.helpText: Usage: /hotcold [number] — No arg shows attempts; number 1-1000 submits a guess.

commands.name: answer
commands.description: Answer the currently active live round.
commands.helpText: Usage: /answer <response> — Submit your answer to the active live round.

arguments.name: response
arguments.helpText: Your answer to the active live round.

commands.name: minigamestats
commands.helpText: Usage: /minigamestats [player] — Show lifetime and current-day stats.

arguments.name: player
arguments.helpText: Player name to look up (default: yourself).

commands.name: minigamestop

arguments.name: category
arguments.helpText: Leaderboard category: points, wordle, hangman, or streak.

commands.name: puzzle
commands.helpText: Usage: /puzzle — Shows which daily puzzles you've played and time until rollover.

commands.name: minigamesban
commands.helpText: Usage: /minigamesban <player> [hours] — Ban permanently (no hours) or temporarily.

arguments.name: hours
arguments.helpText: Hours for temporary ban (omit for permanent).

commands.name: minigamesunban
minigamesresetstats
commands.helpText: Usage: /minigamesresetstats <player> — Wipe all stats for a player.

arguments.name: player
arguments.helpText: Player name whose stats to reset.

commands.name: minigamesskiproundnow
commands.helpText: Usage: /minigamesskiproundnow — Cancel the active live round with no winner.

commands.name: minigamesfirenow
commands.helpText: Usage: /minigamesfirenow [game] — Start a live round now, optionally picking the game.

arguments.name: game
arguments.helpText: Game to fire (trivia, scramble, mathrace, reactionrace). Random if omitted.

commands.name: minigamesreport
commands.helpText: Usage: /minigamesreport — Send a lifetime stats report (total rounds, points, top 5, per-game breakdown).

hooks.name: onChatMessage
hooks.description: Catch raw chat for Reaction race winner detection.

hooks.name: onPlayerDisconnect
hooks.description: Soft cleanup on player disconnect (sessions persist).

cronJobs.name: rolloverDailyPuzzles
cronJobs.description: At UTC midnight: pick new daily puzzles (Wordle, Hangman, Hot/Cold) and clear yesterday's sessions.

cronJobs.name: fireLiveRound
cronJobs.description: If enough time elapsed and enough players online, fire a random enabled live game.

cronJobs.name: closeLiveRound
cronJobs.description: If active live round has expired with no winner, close it and announce the answer.

cronJobs.name: refreshLeaderboards
cronJobs.description: Aggregate player stats and write leaderboard cache.

cronJobs.name: expireWindows
cronJobs.description: Delete daily point window variables from the prior UTC day.

cronJobs.name: expireBans
cronJobs.description: Remove temporary bans whose expiry timestamp has passed.

functions.name: mini-games-helpers

permissions.description: Admin commands: ban, reset, skip round, fire round, report.
